methods.ContentProviderClient acquireContentProv: Returns a ContentProviderClient that is associated with the ContentProvider that services the content at uri, starting the provider if necessary.

methods.SyncInfo getCurrentSync(): This method was deprecated in API level 15. Since multiple concurrent syncs are now supported you should use getCurrentSyncs() to get the accurate list of current syncs. This method returns the first item from the list of current syncs or null if there are none.
